title: RESET 31. A new organization structure
body:
We have reset the archive structure and naming convensions to ensure that we have a correct nature for later re-forest.source cultivation. There are many more things to do, but the core log system between terminals is 92.3% functional.

Cheers.

title: I am a trial and not an error, even when I err.
body: This is a really confidant test.

title: This is a new post I am adding
body:
There is a lot to wonder about sometimes. Like who we are, and why we've been, and how to enter things into an endless system of data which must learn in some sense to mine itself without contrast. We need to make the spelling error marker match the color of the world. No second colors.

### Sometimes I forget we can render this with markdown. We need to remember we can use scales for the size of our fonts.

When I write enough, a scroll bar takes place, and that is kind of neat too. So we can really keep adding more and more and it never really breaks out of the system inside of it.

title: And what does it matter anyways?
body: # This is a test of the box. Why does the font no wannt change?
